case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. DEMETRIA S BERGMANN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61186107) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-10-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-10-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61779047)
